1795450.name: Deck RX Demo
1795450.description:
DeckRX is a rogue-lite deck-builder game where you face your opponents in a completely different way... RACING!

DeckRX mixes traditional rogue-lite deck-building elements such as: card collection, permanent death, turn based tactics, battle against bosses... along with hand-crafted levels in a race to the death!

In this demo version you will be able to play the two first characters -each one with is unique gameplay mechanics-, on the first world: Prima Terra.

Join the Deck Races seeking the immortality and try out the cards, cars, characters and race tracks that Deck Rx brings you!
